item.title: File Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: File Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: filerecovery
item.itunes:summary:
File Recovery Software
(Utilities)
www.filerecoverysoftware.org provides you complete solution in form of File Recovery Software that assists user to restore permanently deleted crucial files and office documents from all kind of fixed or removable USB media in fast and secure manner. Automatic freeware data retrieval tool salvages lost encrypted files having different size and extension just in few mouse clicks. Most affordable File Recovery Software facilitates you to repair complete data from hard disk drive lost due to various reasons such as worm attack, improper disk format, software failure, mistakenly deletion, power fault, damaged drive partition, format or reformat of memory card, logical error, human error, OS failure, improper device management, pen drive pulled out suddenly while operating with device and many more. Simple to operate data rescue utility does not require any previous technical knowledge to make use of software. With the aid of data repair application you can successfully retrieves your missed files, audio, birthday video, office tutorials, songs, digital pictures, text files and xml documents etc saved in your PC or laptop with less efforts. File Recovery Software supports all latest manufacturing brands available in market including Sony, Sandisk, HP, Lexar, Kingston, Kingmax, Nikon, Transcend, Fujifilm and many others. Most demanded File Recovery Software gives you full functionality and flexibility for the recovery of files which are deleted forever from emptied recycle bin folder or by using shift + del command. Inexpensive files restoration tool successfully runs on all major Windows OS like Windows 11/10/8/7 etc with no extra software installation.Features:* Image restoration tool can be operated even through a novice user just because of its graphical interface.* Data revival tool recovers deleted digital images and database tables from damaged SD card.* Specialize File Recovery Software allows you to take back up of lost data from USB drives.

[read more]
item.description:
File Recovery Software
(Utilities)
www.filerecoverysoftware.org provides you complete solution in form of File Recovery Software that assists user to restore permanently deleted crucial files and office documents from all kind of fixed or removable USB media in fast and secure manner. Automatic freeware data retrieval tool salvages lost encrypted files having different size and extension just in few mouse clicks. Most affordable File Recovery Software facilitates you to repair complete data from hard disk drive lost due to various reasons such as worm attack, improper disk format, software failure, mistakenly deletion, power fault, damaged drive partition, format or reformat of memory card, logical error, human error, OS failure, improper device management, pen drive pulled out suddenly while operating with device and many more. [read more]
item.content:encoded:
File Recovery Software
(Utilities)
www.filerecoverysoftware.org provides you complete solution in form of File Recovery Software that assists user to restore permanently deleted crucial files and office documents from all kind of fixed or removable USB media in fast and secure manner. Automatic freeware data retrieval tool salvages lost encrypted files having different size and extension just in few mouse clicks. Most affordable File Recovery Software facilitates you to repair complete data from hard disk drive lost due to various reasons such as worm attack, improper disk format, software failure, mistakenly deletion, power fault, damaged drive partition, format or reformat of memory card, logical error, human error, OS failure, improper device management, pen drive pulled out suddenly while operating with device and many more. Simple to operate data rescue utility does not require any previous technical knowledge to make use of software. With the aid of data repair application you can successfully retrieves your missed files, audio, birthday video, office tutorials, songs, digital pictures, text files and xml documents etc saved in your PC or laptop with less efforts. File Recovery Software supports all latest manufacturing brands available in market including Sony, Sandisk, HP, Lexar, Kingston, Kingmax, Nikon, Transcend, Fujifilm and many others. Most demanded File Recovery Software gives you full functionality and flexibility for the recovery of files which are deleted forever from emptied recycle bin folder or by using shift + del command. Inexpensive files restoration tool successfully runs on all major Windows OS like Windows 11/10/8/7 etc with no extra software installation.Features:* Image restoration tool can be operated even through a novice user just because of its graphical interface.* Data revival tool recovers deleted digital images and database tables from damaged SD card.* Specialize File Recovery Software allows you to take back up of lost data from USB drives.

[read more]

item.title: GS GRAPHIC RENDERINGS [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:title: GS GRAPHIC RENDERINGS [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:author: revwhiteshadow
item.itunes:summary:
GS GRAPHIC RENDERINGS
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
GS Graphic Renderings Tweak is a powerful tool designed to enhance the graphic rendering capabilities of Android devices. With this tweak, users have the freedom to choose between three advanced rendering options: OpenGL ES, Sikagl, and VulkanSika.
OpenGL ES, a widely-used graphics API, provides a solid foundation for rendering graphics on Android devices. It offers a high level of compatibility and performance, ensuring smooth and visually appealing graphics for gaming and multimedia applications.

Sikagl, an innovative rendering framework, introduces cutting-edge features and optimizations to deliver stunning visuals. With Sikagl, users can experience enhanced shading, lighting, and special effects, pushing the boundaries of graphic rendering on their Android devices.

VulkanSika, a modern and efficient graphics API, takes advantage of the latest hardware capabilities to deliver unparalleled performance and visual fidelity. By leveraging multi-threading and low-level hardware control, VulkanSika optimizes resource utilization and provides a smooth and responsive user experience, especially for graphically-intensive applications.

With the GS Graphic Renderings Tweak, users can seamlessly switch between these rendering options based on their preferences and specific application requirements. Whether they seek compatibility, advanced features, or maximum performance, this tweak empowers users to unlock the full potential of their Android devices and enjoy a customized and immersive graphical experience.
[read more]
item.description:
GS GRAPHIC RENDERINGS
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
GS Graphic Renderings Tweak is a powerful tool designed to enhance the graphic rendering capabilities of Android devices. With this tweak, users have the freedom to choose between three advanced rendering options: OpenGL ES, Sikagl, and VulkanSika.
OpenGL ES, a widely-used graphics API, provides a solid foundation for rendering graphics on Android devices. It offers a high level of compatibility and performance, ensuring smooth and visually appealing graphics for gaming and multimedia applications.

Sikagl, an innovative rendering framework, introduces cutting-edge features and optimizations to deliver stunning visuals. With Sikagl, users can experience enhanced shading, lighting, and special effects, pushing the boundaries of graphic rendering on their Android devices.

VulkanSika, a modern and efficient graphics API, takes advantage of the latest hardware capabilities to deliver unparalleled performance and visual fidelity. By leveraging multi-threading and low-level hardware control, VulkanSika optimizes resource utilization and provides a smooth and responsive user experience, especially for graphically-intensive applications.

With the GS Graphic Renderings Tweak, users can seamlessly switch between these rendering options based on their preferences and specific application requirements. Whether they seek compatibility, advanced features, or maximum performance, this tweak empowers users to unlock the full potential of their Android devices and enjoy a customized and immersive graphical experience.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
GS GRAPHIC RENDERINGS
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
GS Graphic Renderings Tweak is a powerful tool designed to enhance the graphic rendering capabilities of Android devices. With this tweak, users have the freedom to choose between three advanced rendering options: OpenGL ES, Sikagl, and VulkanSika.
OpenGL ES, a widely-used graphics API, provides a solid foundation for rendering graphics on Android devices. It offers a high level of compatibility and performance, ensuring smooth and visually appealing graphics for gaming and multimedia applications.

Sikagl, an innovative rendering framework, introduces cutting-edge features and optimizations to deliver stunning visuals. With Sikagl, users can experience enhanced shading, lighting, and special effects, pushing the boundaries of graphic rendering on their Android devices.

VulkanSika, a modern and efficient graphics API, takes advantage of the latest hardware capabilities to deliver unparalleled performance and visual fidelity. By leveraging multi-threading and low-level hardware control, VulkanSika optimizes resource utilization and provides a smooth and responsive user experience, especially for graphically-intensive applications.

With the GS Graphic Renderings Tweak, users can seamlessly switch between these rendering options based on their preferences and specific application requirements. Whether they seek compatibility, advanced features, or maximum performance, this tweak empowers users to unlock the full potential of their Android devices and enjoy a customized and immersive graphical experience.
[read more]

item.title: Recover Deleted Document [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Recover Deleted Document [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: filerecovery
item.itunes:summary:
Recover Deleted Document
(Utilities)
Commercial file retrieval application is built to rescue multiple files such as text files, digital photographs, audio, party video and your valuable and worthless office documents from fixed memory sticks, external hard disk drives, SD cards, picture cards HDD drives and pen drives. Best data restoration software supports major file formats which are used to save multiple data like tiff, Png, jpeg, mov, midi, mp3 and mp4. Affordable recover deleted document software has lots of working areas including companies, schools, colleges and even home as it is very easy to use. Using Professional data salvage utility even novice or any non technical user becomes expert and rescues all their essential but erased data in just few mouse clicks. Major manufactures supported by Data repair software are Kingston, Transcend, Sony, Lexar, Fujifilm, Nikon, Sandisk, Kingmax etc as well as it can handle high capacity storage media also like 1GB, 2GB, 4GB and 8GB. Recover deleted document tool can rescue any type of data loss like accidental deletion, formatted disk, logically corrupted media, partitioning error and other similar reasons. Freeware data recovery software is available with such impressive features and functionality for instance it has read only utility because of which it can easily repair any type of file without modifying other files or folders.Software features:* Best data restoration software is easy to use because of its user friendly and interactive interface.* Free data recovery software can easily support lots of latest brands of USB drives and hard disks.* Professional data salvage utility can rescue music files, text data, songs, video and many other important office files.* Advance Recover deleted document utility can even repair those data which is lost in virus attack, human error or any other similar reasons.

[read more]
item.description:
Recover Deleted Document

Commercial file retrieval application is built to rescue multiple files such as text files, digital photographs, audio, party video and your valuable and worthless office documents from fixed memory sticks, external hard disk drives, SD cards, picture cards HDD drives and pen drives. [read more]

item.title: USB Removable Media Files Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: USB Removable Media Files Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: filerecovery
item.itunes:summary:
USB Removable Media Files Recovery
(Utilities)
Easy to use and compatible USB Removable Media Files Recovery utility recuperates mislaid data from USB drive in just easiest manner even after error messages like "Drive not detected" is displayed on computer screen. USB media file retrieval program helps user to recoup damaged files and folders of all major file formats from key chain drive before fix and repair corrupted storage device in user’s convenient manner. USB hard drive media files salvager tool gets back accidentally lost folders from flash memory even when data has been missed or corrupted due to common data loss instances including power surge, system failure, virus affected USB device and many more.

[read more]
item.description:
USB Removable Media Files Recovery
(Utilities)
Easy to use and compatible USB Removable Media Files Recovery utility recuperates mislaid data from USB drive in just easiest manner even after error messages like "Drive not detected" is displayed on computer screen. USB media file retrieval program helps user to recoup damaged files and folders of all major file formats from key chain drive before fix and repair corrupted storage device in user’s convenient manner. USB hard drive media files salvager tool gets back accidentally lost folders from flash memory even when data has been missed or corrupted due to common data loss instances including power surge, system failure, virus affected USB device and many more.

[read more]

item.title: Photos Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Photos Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: filerecovery
item.itunes:summary:
Photos Recovery Software
(Utilities)
Economical Photos recovery software is a simple application for storage devices digital picture recovery purpose. Photos restoration software enables users to preview of recovered image files before saving them at specified location. With the help of Photos recovery software user can repair and restores their important pictures in a very simplified manner. User friendly Photos recovery software allows users to undelete lost images from damaged flash drives, memory cards and other storage devices in a simplest mode. Software provides best option to efficiently regain lost, missing or inaccessible digital data, images and other important photograph that have been lost due to various reasons.

[read more]
item.description:

item.title: Nexus Launcher [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Nexus Launcher [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: thre-team
item.itunes:summary:
Nexus Launcher
(Utilities)
(^_^)v
Make it so fun.

After Reboot, goto settings, select Pixel Launcher as default launcher.

For Android 14
Tested on:
AOSP UD1A
AOSP UP1A
DerpFest A14

- Mod Recent Translucent BG

All App by Google

Nexus Recent || for cange default recent A14
by ThRE Team
Source code
https://github.com/ThRE-Team/Nexus-Recent-A14

#########################

For Android 13 and UpsideDownCake only.
Tested on:
LineageOS 20
crDroid 9.5
LMO Droid 4.0
ArrowOS 13.1
Aosp TQ2A
Android UpsideDownCake GSI

Nexus/Pixel Launcher
Apps by Google
Downloaded from ApkMirror.com
https://www.apkmirror.com/apk/google-inc/pixel-launcher/pixel-launcher-13-release/

Google Wallpapers UpsideDownCake
Apps by Google
Downloaded from ApkMirror.com
https://www.apkmirror.com/apk/google-inc/google-wallpaper-picker/google-wallpaper-picker-upsidedowncake-release/
ported from UpsideDownCake to 13.

Pixel Themes UpsideDownCake
Apps by Google
Downloaded from ApkMirror.com
https://www.apkmirror.com/apk/google-inc/pixel-themes/pixel-themes-upsidedowncake-release/
I'm ported from UpsideDownCake to 13.

Nexus Recent || for cange default recent A13
by ThRE Team
Source code
https://github.com/ThRE-Team/Nexus-Recent-A13

Notes:
Lite version: Only launcher and wallpaper.
Full Version; Launcher with more features.
Beta Version: Launcher with more mod.
4Magisk: Instal from Magisk Module.
4Twrp: Install from custom recovery.

by ThRE Team
Enjoy Your Life!!!

[read more]

(Utilities)

4Twrp: Install from custom recovery.

by ThRE Team
Enjoy Your Life!!!

[read more]

item.title: Qtractor [Music Production]
item.itunes:title: Qtractor [Music Production]
item.itunes:author: rncbc
item.itunes:summary:
Qtractor
(Music Production)
Qtractor is an audio/MIDI multi-track sequencer application written in C++ with the Qt framework. Target platform is Linux, where the Jack Audio Connection Kit (JACK) for audio and the Advanced Linux Sound Architecture (ALSA) for MIDI are the main infrastructures to evolve as a fairly-featured Linux desktop audio workstation GUI, specially dedicated to the personal home-studio.
Features:

- Multi-track audio and MIDI sequencing and recording.
- Developed on the Qt C++ application and UI framework.
- Uses JACK for audio and ALSA sequencer for MIDI as multimedia infrastructures.
- Traditional multi-track tape recorder control paradigm.
- Audio file formats support: OGG (via libvorbis), MP3 (via libmad, playback only), WAV, FLAC, AIFF and many, many more (via libsndfile).
- Standard MIDI files support (format 0 and 1).
- Non-destructive, non-linear editing.
- Unlimited number of tracks per session/project.
- Unlimited number of overlapping clips per track.
- XML encoded session/project description files (SDI).
- Point-and-click, multi-select, drag-and-drop interaction (drag, move, drop, cut, copy, paste, paste-repeat, delete, split, merge).
- Unlimited undo/redo.
- Built-in mixer and monitor controls.
- Built-in connection patchbay control and persistence (a-la QjackCtl).
- LADSPA, DSSI, native VST(2), VST3, CLAP and LV2 plug-ins support.
- Unlimited number of plug-ins per track or bus.
- Plug-in presets, programs and chunk/configurations support, including native VST FXB/FXP file support.
- Unlimited audio/MIDI effect send/return inserts per track or bus.
- Loop-recording/takes.
- Audio/MIDI clip fade-in/out, cross-fade (linear, quadratic, cubic).
- Audio/MIDI clip gain/volume, normalize, export.
- Audio/MIDI track and plugin parameter automation (dynamic curves, sample&hold, linear and spline modes).
- Audio clip time-stretching (WSOLA-like or via librubberband),
pitch-shifting (via librubberband) and seamless sample-rate conversion (via libsamplerate).
- Audio/MIDI track export (mix-down, render, merge, freeze).
- Audio/MIDI metronome bar/beat clicks.
- Unlimited tempo/time-signature map.
- Unlimited location/bar markers.
- MIDI clip editor (matrix/piano roll).
- MIDI instrument definitions (a-la Cakewalk(tm) (*.ins)); SoundFont (*.sf2) and MIDI Names XML (*.midnam) files also supported.
- MIDI controller mapping/learn/assignment (mixer and plug-in parameters).
- MIDI system exclusive (SysEx) setups.
- JACK transport sync master/slave.
- JACK session support.
- NSM (Non/New Session Management) support.
- MMC control surface enabled.
- MIDI Clock, Song Position Pointer (SPP) support.
- Configurable PC-keyboard and MIDI controller shortcuts.
[read more]
item.description:
Qtractor
(Music Production)
Qtractor is an audio/MIDI multi-track sequencer application written in C++ with the Qt framework. Target platform is Linux, where the Jack Audio Connection Kit (JACK) for audio and the Advanced Linux Sound Architecture (ALSA) for MIDI are the main infrastructures to evolve as a fairly-featured Linux desktop audio workstation GUI, specially dedicated to the personal home-studio.
Features:

- Multi-track audio and MIDI sequencing and recording.
- Developed on the Qt C++ application and UI framework.
- Uses JACK for audio and ALSA sequencer for MIDI as multimedia infrastructures.
- Traditional multi-track tape recorder control paradigm.
- Audio file formats support: OGG (via libvorbis), MP3 (via libmad, playback only), WAV, FLAC, AIFF and many, many more (via libsndfile).
- Standard MIDI files support (format 0 and 1).
- Non-destructive, non-linear editing.
- Unlimited number of tracks per session/project.
- Unlimited number of overlapping clips per track.
- XML encoded session/project description files (SDI).
- Point-and-click, multi-select, drag-and-drop interaction (drag, move, drop, cut, copy, paste, paste-repeat, delete, split, merge).
- Unlimited undo/redo.
- Built-in mixer and monitor controls.
- Built-in connection patchbay control and persistence (a-la QjackCtl).
- LADSPA, DSSI, native VST(2), VST3, CLAP and LV2 plug-ins support.
- Unlimited number of plug-ins per track or bus.
- Plug-in presets, programs and chunk/configurations support, including native VST FXB/FXP file support.
- Unlimited audio/MIDI effect send/return inserts per track or bus.
- Loop-recording/takes.
- Audio/MIDI clip fade-in/out, cross-fade (linear, quadratic, cubic).
- Audio/MIDI clip gain/volume, normalize, export.
- Audio/MIDI track and plugin parameter automation (dynamic curves, sample&hold, linear and spline modes).
- Audio clip time-stretching (WSOLA-like or via librubberband),
pitch-shifting (via librubberband) and seamless sample-rate conversion (via libsamplerate).
- Audio/MIDI track export (mix-down, render, merge, freeze).
- Audio/MIDI metronome bar/beat clicks.
- Unlimited tempo/time-signature map.
- Unlimited location/bar markers.
- MIDI clip editor (matrix/piano roll).
- MIDI instrument definitions (a-la Cakewalk(tm) (*.ins)); SoundFont (*.sf2) and MIDI Names XML (*.midnam) files also supported.
- MIDI controller mapping/learn/assignment (mixer and plug-in parameters).
- MIDI system exclusive (SysEx) setups.
- JACK transport sync master/slave.
- JACK session support.
- NSM (Non/New Session Management) support.
- MMC control surface enabled.
- MIDI Clock, Song Position Pointer (SPP) support.
- Configurable PC-keyboard and MIDI controller shortcuts.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Qtractor
(Music Production)
Qtractor is an audio/MIDI multi-track sequencer application written in C++ with the Qt framework. Target platform is Linux, where the Jack Audio Connection Kit (JACK) for audio and the Advanced Linux Sound Architecture (ALSA) for MIDI are the main infrastructures to evolve as a fairly-featured Linux desktop audio workstation GUI, specially dedicated to the personal home-studio.
Features:

- Multi-track audio and MIDI sequencing and recording.
- Developed on the Qt C++ application and UI framework.
- Uses JACK for audio and ALSA sequencer for MIDI as multimedia infrastructures.
- Traditional multi-track tape recorder control paradigm.
- Audio file formats support: OGG (via libvorbis), MP3 (via libmad, playback only), WAV, FLAC, AIFF and many, many more (via libsndfile).
- Standard MIDI files support (format 0 and 1).
- Non-destructive, non-linear editing.
- Unlimited number of tracks per session/project.
- Unlimited number of overlapping clips per track.
- XML encoded session/project description files (SDI).
- Point-and-click, multi-select, drag-and-drop interaction (drag, move, drop, cut, copy, paste, paste-repeat, delete, split, merge).
- Unlimited undo/redo.
- Built-in mixer and monitor controls.
- Built-in connection patchbay control and persistence (a-la QjackCtl).
- LADSPA, DSSI, native VST(2), VST3, CLAP and LV2 plug-ins support.
- Unlimited number of plug-ins per track or bus.
- Plug-in presets, programs and chunk/configurations support, including native VST FXB/FXP file support.
- Unlimited audio/MIDI effect send/return inserts per track or bus.
- Loop-recording/takes.
- Audio/MIDI clip fade-in/out, cross-fade (linear, quadratic, cubic).
- Audio/MIDI clip gain/volume, normalize, export.
- Audio/MIDI track and plugin parameter automation (dynamic curves, sample&hold, linear and spline modes).
- Audio clip time-stretching (WSOLA-like or via librubberband),
pitch-shifting (via librubberband) and seamless sample-rate conversion (via libsamplerate).
- Audio/MIDI track export (mix-down, render, merge, freeze).
- Audio/MIDI metronome bar/beat clicks.
- Unlimited tempo/time-signature map.
- Unlimited location/bar markers.
- MIDI clip editor (matrix/piano roll).
- MIDI instrument definitions (a-la Cakewalk(tm) (*.ins)); SoundFont (*.sf2) and MIDI Names XML (*.midnam) files also supported.
- MIDI controller mapping/learn/assignment (mixer and plug-in parameters).
- MIDI system exclusive (SysEx) setups.
- JACK transport sync master/slave.
- JACK session support.
- NSM (Non/New Session Management) support.
- MMC control surface enabled.
- MIDI Clock, Song Position Pointer (SPP) support.
- Configurable PC-keyboard and MIDI controller shortcuts.
[read more]

item.title: ReVanced MicroG [Internet Apps]
item.itunes:title: ReVanced MicroG [Internet Apps]
item.itunes:author: remicro
item.itunes:summary:
ReVanced MicroG
(Internet Apps)
ReVanced MicroG is based on MicroG - an open source project which aims to provide privacy. Get subscription, YT history and other your date in the YT ReVanced.

item.title: Digital Picture Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Digital Picture Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: filerecovery
item.itunes:summary:
Digital Picture Recovery
(Utilities)
Digital Picture Recovery software is equipped with latest and unique Technology to restore the missing files and picture gallery lost due to human error. Digital Picture Recovery software is available on www.filerecoverysoftware.org website which is easily recovers the images and snaps deleted from the handy drive, jump stick etc. Regain software support all digital camera recovery.

[read more]

[read more]

Digital Picture Recovery
(Utilities)
Digital Picture Recovery software is equipped with latest and unique Technology to restore the missing files and picture gallery lost due to human error. Digital Picture Recovery software is available on www.filerecoverysoftware.org website which is easily recovers the images and snaps deleted from the handy drive, jump stick etc. Regain software support all digital camera recovery.

[read more]

item.title: GOOGLE SERVICE CONTROLLER [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:title: GOOGLE SERVICE CONTROLLER [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:author: revwhiteshadow
item.itunes:summary:
GOOGLE SERVICE CONTROLLER
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
Google Service Controller Magisk Module: Streamlining Your Android Experience
Introduction

In the vast Android customization landscape, Magisk modules play a pivotal role in enhancing user control over their devices. One such module that has garnered attention is the Google Service Controller, developed by the skilled developer known as RevWhiteShadow from the GodTspeed community. This Magisk module presents a unique approach to managing Google service apps on your Android device, offering users unparalleled control and convenience.

Overview

The Google Service Controller Magisk Module is designed to provide users with a powerful tool for managing Google service apps. It allows users to selectively disable all Google service apps, including system apps, with a simple toggle. This can be particularly beneficial for users seeking to optimize system resources, extend battery life, or enhance privacy by limiting Google's data collection.

Key Features

1. Comprehensive Google App Management
The module offers a comprehensive solution, enabling users to turn off all Google service apps at once. This includes popular apps such as Gmail, Google Maps, Google Drive, and more. This level of granularity empowers users to tailor their device's functionality according to their preferences.

2. Single-Click Restore
One of the standout features of the Google Service Controller is its single-click restore functionality. Users can effortlessly restore all Google service apps to their original state with a simple click. This ensures that users can quickly switch between customized and default configurations based on their needs.

3. Command-Line Control
For users comfortable with command-line interactions, the module supports an Android terminal command: su -c gsc. This command serves as a convenient way to toggle the module's functionality, providing a quick and efficient method for advanced users to manage Google service apps.

4. Developer Inspiration: GAppsLite
The Google Service Controller Magisk Module draws inspiration from GAppsLite, another well-known project in the Android customization community. GAppsLite aims to provide a minimal and streamlined set of Google apps, emphasizing efficiency and resource optimization. The Google Service Controller builds upon this concept, offering users additional control through its Magisk integration.

Developer Insights: RevWhiteShadow

RevWhiteShadow, the developer behind the Google Service Controller, is an active contributor to the GodTspeed community. This community, known for its focus on optimizing Android devices, benefits from the expertise and dedication of developers like RevWhiteShadow. The Google Service Controller reflects the developer's commitment to providing users with effective tools for managing their Android experience.

Conclusion

In the ever-evolving realm of Android customization, the Google Service Controller Magisk Module stands out as a valuable addition to the toolkit of users seeking control over their Google service apps. Its user-friendly approach, combined with advanced features like single-click restore and command-line control, makes it a versatile choice for a wide range of Android enthusiasts.

As you explore the capabilities of the Google Service Controller, remember that its development is an ongoing process. Regular updates and community feedback contribute to its refinement, ensuring that users continue to enjoy an optimized Android experience.

With the Google Service Controller Magisk Module, take charge of your device's Google services like never before – a testament to the power of Magisk modules in shaping the Android landscape.

[read more]

GOOGLE SERVICE CONTROLLER
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))

The Google Service Controller Magisk Module is designed to provide users with a powerful tool for managing Google service apps. It allows users to selectively disable all Google service apps, including system apps, with a simple toggle. With the Google Service Controller Magisk Module, take charge of your device's Google services like never before – a testament to the power of Magisk modules in shaping the Android landscape.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
GOOGLE SERVICE CONTROLLER
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
Google Service Controller Magisk Module: Streamlining Your Android Experience
Introduction

In the vast Android customization landscape, Magisk modules play a pivotal role in enhancing user control over their devices. One such module that has garnered attention is the Google Service Controller, developed by the skilled developer known as RevWhiteShadow from the GodTspeed community. This Magisk module presents a unique approach to managing Google service apps on your Android device, offering users unparalleled control and convenience.

Overview

The Google Service Controller Magisk Module is designed to provide users with a powerful tool for managing Google service apps. It allows users to selectively disable all Google service apps, including system apps, with a simple toggle. This can be particularly beneficial for users seeking to optimize system resources, extend battery life, or enhance privacy by limiting Google's data collection.

Key Features

1. Comprehensive Google App Management
The module offers a comprehensive solution, enabling users to turn off all Google service apps at once. This includes popular apps such as Gmail, Google Maps, Google Drive, and more. This level of granularity empowers users to tailor their device's functionality according to their preferences.

2. Single-Click Restore
One of the standout features of the Google Service Controller is its single-click restore functionality. Users can effortlessly restore all Google service apps to their original state with a simple click. This ensures that users can quickly switch between customized and default configurations based on their needs.

3. Command-Line Control
For users comfortable with command-line interactions, the module supports an Android terminal command: su -c gsc. This command serves as a convenient way to toggle the module's functionality, providing a quick and efficient method for advanced users to manage Google service apps.

4. Developer Inspiration: GAppsLite
The Google Service Controller Magisk Module draws inspiration from GAppsLite, another well-known project in the Android customization community. GAppsLite aims to provide a minimal and streamlined set of Google apps, emphasizing efficiency and resource optimization. The Google Service Controller builds upon this concept, offering users additional control through its Magisk integration.

Developer Insights: RevWhiteShadow

RevWhiteShadow, the developer behind the Google Service Controller, is an active contributor to the GodTspeed community. This community, known for its focus on optimizing Android devices, benefits from the expertise and dedication of developers like RevWhiteShadow. The Google Service Controller reflects the developer's commitment to providing users with effective tools for managing their Android experience.

Conclusion

In the ever-evolving realm of Android customization, the Google Service Controller Magisk Module stands out as a valuable addition to the toolkit of users seeking control over their Google service apps. Its user-friendly approach, combined with advanced features like single-click restore and command-line control, makes it a versatile choice for a wide range of Android enthusiasts.

As you explore the capabilities of the Google Service Controller, remember that its development is an ongoing process. Regular updates and community feedback contribute to its refinement, ensuring that users continue to enjoy an optimized Android experience.

With the Google Service Controller Magisk Module, take charge of your device's Google services like never before – a testament to the power of Magisk modules in shaping the Android landscape.

[read more]
